title: mentha × niliaca var. nemorosa
intro: Mentha × niliaca var. nemorosa, also known as woodland mint or apple mint, is a variety of hybrid mint that is native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antibacterial and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha × niliaca var. nemorosa include reducing nausea and vomiting, alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and providing relief from headaches and fever. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve mental clarity.
